stages.notes: cloned at ee72eba, MIT, archived upstream; nested .git stripped, SHA recorded in target-rationale.md
migration-plan.md: 7 risks, M0-M7 sequence, 4-layer characterization plan
18 files / 157 tests: reducers(83) middleware(12) agent(28) flows(26) + harness
M0-M7 complete: 0 class components, 0 connect(), all upstream behaviors preserved per log
review-report.md: clean verdict, 0 fixes, follow-up punch list incl. marked CVE
README.md (EN technical) + one-pager.md (KR client-facing); factual corrections applied by pipeline lead
all characterization tests pass on migrated code; no regressions; builds and serves cleanly

decisions.rationale: Chose archived MIT realworld app over larger GPL/unlicensed candidates; 2340 LOC slightly under rough floor — flagged in target-rationale.md
React 17 (not 18): createRoot auto-batching would change observable update timing — out of migration scope
react-router-dom 5.3.4 (not 6): v4 Switch/Route/exact semantics carry over identically; v6 rewrite listed as follow-up
marked stays pinned 0.3.6: sanitize:true removed in modern marked, exact escaping not reproducible — CVEs flagged for review report
superagent kept, superagent-promise dropped: superagent>=3 natively thenable with identical resolve/reject shapes; HTTP lib swap is out of lane
Known upstream bugs preserved, not fixed (pagination page-size mismatch, jwt '' on logout, undefined controlled inputs, DELETE_COMMENT null assumption)

Characterized 7 as-is behaviors incl. DELETE_COMMENT throw on undefined comments, logout jwt=''  not removeItem, settings ASYNC_START no subtype gate, unreachable PROFILE_FAVORITES_* action types, omitSlug slug:undefined key, marked sanitize escaping, unguarded favorite dispatch
M0: .js→.jsx renames so stock Vite handles JSX; extensionless imports unchanged
M0: dropped write-only state.router slice with react-router-redux; redirect now history.push in App
M4: Editor stale-slug willReceiveProps bug NOT replicated (unreachable path) — flagged in migration-log.md
M4: Settings never dispatched SETTINGS_PAGE_UNLOADED upstream — preserved exactly
M4: controlled-input eager ev.target.value capture — lazy read inside setState updater loses keystrokes (caught by settings flow test)
Corrected doc-writer overclaims: app age 2018-era not 10yrs, bundle-size baseline was M0 Vite build not CRA, softened perf/security claims
